full_text:
Empress Mu 穆皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Mu (穆皇后)was born in Chenliu. Consort and later Empress of Liu Bei. From Chenliu. Wu Yi’s sister. Empress Mu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Empress Mu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
